pullRequest.title: feat: add ability to set a custom verbose name
pullRequest.body:
Adds the option to override the verbose name created by DjangoModelTranslation to the TranslationOptions.

This allows for creating a custom verbose name to be displayed in the Django Admin.

**Note**
I tried to run linters on the project and it resulted in a huge set of changes so I left them out of this PR.

Closes #768

pullRequest.title: Fix JSON fields not being updated using update_translation_fields that have a default dict or list
pullRequest.body:
This is related to #801 which required tests but has been stale for a while.
I copied the fix from that PR and added the required tests.
Fixes #800.
